queries.question: Show all the flight attendants and pilots who trained at the Aviation Academy.
queries.sql:
SELECT Flight_Attendants.name
FROM Flight_Attendants JOIN Aviation_Academies ON Flight_Attendants.Training_Center = Aviation_Academies.Name
WHERE Aviation_Academies.name = "Aviation Academy"
UNION
SELECT Pilots.name
FROM Pilots JOIN Aviation_Academies ON Pilots.Training_Center = Aviation_Academies.Name
WHERE Aviation_Academies.name = "Aviation Academy"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?flight_attendants a :Flight_Attendants .
    ?aviation_academies a :Aviation_Academies .
    ?flight_attendants p:Training_Center ?training_center_l .
    ?aviation_academies p:name ?name_r .
    ?flight_attendants p:name ?name .
    ?aviation_academies p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?training_center_l) = STR(?name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Aviation Academy")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?pilots a :Pilots .
    ?aviation_academies a :Aviation_Academies .
    ?pilots p:Training_Center ?training_center_l .
    ?aviation_academies p:name ?name_r .
    ?pilots p:name ?name .
    ?aviation_academies p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?training_center_l) = STR(?name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Aviation Academy")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
